fixtureNotes: 9 fills, 4 closed paired trades, 1 open (UPL). Edge cases: ISO date YYYY-MM-DD (vs other Indian brokers using DD-MM-YYYY/DD/MM/YYYY), 'B'/'S' single-letter sides, comma-formatted Trade Value with quotes ('23,600.00'), separate Settlement Date column, 1-second-apart same-symbol trades (APOLLOHOSP 10:45:00 and 10:45:01 — tests stable secondary sort). Brokerage + STT columns present.
